uiBuilder.label: D3 Sankey Diagram
uiBuilder.description: A configurable Sankey flow diagram rendered with D3.js and the d3-sankey plugin. Nodes are bars; links are proportional curved ribbons. Color links by source/target/gradient, align and sort nodes, highlight connected flows on hover, and hook click/hover events.

properties.name: data
properties.label: Data · Graph data
properties.description: A graph object { nodes: [ { name, color? } ], links: [ { source, target, value } ] }. source/target may be a node NAME (string) or a node INDEX (number). Bind to a data resource or leave empty to show built-in sample data.

properties.name: chartTitle
properties.label: Header & border · Title
properties.description: Title rendered above the diagram. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: titleFontSize
properties.label: Header & border · Title font size
properties.description: Font size of the title, in pixels.

properties.name: titleColor
properties.label: Header & border · Title color
properties.description: Text color of the title.

properties.name: componentWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Width
properties.description: Outer width of the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "50%", "640px". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: componentPadding
properties.label: Header & border · Padding
properties.description: Padding around the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "12px", "1rem". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.label: Header & border · Background color
properties.description: Diagram background. CSS color or "transparent".

properties.name: borderColor
properties.label: Header & border · Border color
properties.description: Border color of the widget. Leave blank for no border.

properties.name: borderWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Border width
properties.description: Border thickness in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: borderRadius
properties.label: Header & border · Border radius
properties.description: Rounded corners of the widget, in pixels.

properties.name: chartHeight
properties.label: Display · Chart height (px)
properties.description: Height of the diagram in pixels.

properties.name: animate
properties.label: Display · Animate
properties.description: Animate nodes and links growing in on first render and on data change.

properties.name: animationDuration
properties.label: Display · Animation duration (ms)
properties.description: Duration of the grow-in animation in milliseconds.

properties.name: animationEasing
properties.label: Display · Animation easing
properties.description: Easing curve for the grow-in animation.

properties.name: animationStagger
properties.label: Animation · Animation stagger (ms)
properties.description: Delay between categories for a cascade grow-in (0 = all bars animate together).

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.label: Display · Base font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for diagram text that doesn't have its own family set. Blank = inherit from the page.

properties.name: hoverColor
properties.label: Display · Hover color (when hover highlight on)
properties.description: Color a column turns on hover. Blank = automatically brighten the column's own color.

properties.name: dropShadow
properties.label: Display · Drop shadow
properties.description: Apply a soft drop shadow to the node bars.

properties.name: shadowColor
properties.label: Display · Shadow color (when drop shadow on)
properties.description: Color of the drop shadow (supports rgba).

properties.name: shadowBlur
properties.label: Display · Shadow blur (when drop shadow on)
properties.description: Blur radius of the drop shadow, in pixels.

properties.name: nodeAlign
properties.label: Nodes · Alignment
properties.description: How node columns are positioned horizontally. Justify spreads sinks to the right edge; Left/Right/Center anchor nodes per d3-sankey's alignment functions.

properties.name: nodeWidth
properties.label: Nodes · Width (px)
properties.description: Thickness of each node bar, in pixels.

properties.name: nodePadding
properties.label: Nodes · Vertical padding (px)
properties.description: Vertical gap between stacked nodes in the same column, in pixels.

properties.name: nodeCornerRadius
properties.label: Nodes · Corner radius (px)
properties.description: Rounded corners on the node bars, in pixels. 0 = square.

properties.name: nodeStroke
properties.label: Nodes · Border color
properties.description: Outline color of the node bars. Blank = no outline.

properties.name: nodeStrokeWidth
properties.label: Nodes · Border width (px)
properties.description: Outline thickness of the node bars, in pixels. 0 = no outline.

properties.name: nodeSort
properties.label: Nodes · Vertical sort
properties.description: Order of nodes within a column. Auto = d3-sankey's default (minimize crossings); None = input order; Ascending/Descending = by node total throughflow.

properties.name: linkColorMode
properties.label: Links · Color mode
properties.description: How ribbons are colored. Source = source node's color; Target = target node's color; Gradient = fades from source color to target color; Static = a single color for all links.

properties.name: linkStaticColor
properties.label: Links · Static color (when mode = Static)
properties.description: Color used for all ribbons when Color mode is Static.

properties.name: linkOpacity
properties.label: Links · Opacity
properties.description: Opacity of the ribbons from 0 (transparent) to 1 (solid).

properties.name: linkHoverOpacity
properties.label: Links · Hover opacity
properties.description: Opacity a ribbon rises to on hover (0 to 1).

properties.name: linkCurvature
properties.label: Links · Curvature
properties.description: Curviness of the ribbons from 0 (nearly straight) to 1 (strongly S-curved).

properties.name: linkHover
properties.label: Links · Highlight whole path on hover
properties.description: When hovering a ribbon, brighten its entire connected source-and-target nodes too.

properties.name: hoverHighlight
properties.label: Links · Highlight connected on node hover
properties.description: When hovering a node, emphasize the links and nodes connected to it.

properties.name: hoverDimOthers
properties.label: Links · Dim others on hover
properties.description: Fade unrelated nodes/links while hovering a node or link, so the active flow stands out.

properties.name: useSeriesColors
properties.label: Colors · Use node colors
properties.description: Use each node's own 'color' field when present. Falls back to the scheme/palette otherwise.

properties.name: colorScheme
properties.label: Colors · Color scheme
properties.description: Pick a built-in D3 categorical scheme to color the nodes, or Custom to use the Color palette below. Per-node colors in the data still win when 'Use node colors' is on.

properties.name: colorPalette
properties.label: Colors · Color palette
properties.description: JSON array of CSS colors cycled across nodes when 'Use node colors' is off and Color scheme is Custom, e.g. ["#2E93fA","#66DA26"].

properties.name: showNodeLabels
properties.label: Labels · Show node labels
properties.description: Draw a text label beside each node.

properties.name: nodeLabelPosition
properties.label: Labels · Position
properties.description: Where labels sit relative to the node. Outside = left of leftmost / right of others; Inside = inset within the column; Auto = outside-aware placement that keeps edge labels in view.

properties.name: nodeLabelFontSize
properties.label: Labels · Font size (px)
properties.description: Font size of the node labels, in pixels.

properties.name: nodeLabelColor
properties.label: Labels · Color
properties.description: Text color of the node labels.

properties.name: showNodeValues
properties.label: Labels · Show node totals
properties.description: Append each node's total throughflow value to its label.

properties.name: nodeValueFontSize
properties.label: Labels · Value font size (px)
properties.description: Font size of the in-node value text, in pixels.

properties.name: nodeValueColor
properties.label: Labels · Value color
properties.description: Text color of the in-node value. Default white reads well on the categorical node colors.

properties.name: nodeValueFormat
properties.label: Labels · Value format
properties.description: Optional d3-format specifier for numeric values, e.g. ",.0f", ".1f", "~s". Blank = raw value.

properties.name: valueFormat
properties.label: Labels · Value format
properties.description: D3 number format specifier for node totals and link tooltip values (e.g. ".0f", ",.0f", "$,.0f", ".2s"). Blank = default.

properties.name: showTooltip
properties.label: Tooltip · Show tooltip
properties.description: Show a hover tooltip over nodes and links.

properties.name: tooltipTemplate
properties.label: Tooltip · Node template
properties.description: Tooltip content for a NODE (light HTML allowed). Tokens: {name}, {value} (raw total), {formattedValue}, {swatch} (a colored dot matching the node), {color}. Interpolated values are HTML-escaped. Links use a built-in 'source to target: value' tooltip.

properties.name: tooltipFollowCursor
properties.label: Tooltip · Follow cursor
properties.description: Tooltip follows the pointer. Either way it's clamped within the chart bounds.

properties.name: tooltipBackground
properties.label: Tooltip · Background color
properties.description: Tooltip background (CSS color, supports rgba).

properties.name: tooltipTextColor
properties.label: Tooltip · Text color
properties.description: Tooltip text color.

properties.name: tooltipFontSize
properties.label: Tooltip · Font size
properties.description: Tooltip font size, in pixels.

actions.name: CHART_CLICKED
actions.label: Chart clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks the diagram background (not a node or link).

actions.name: NODE_CLICKED
actions.label: Node clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks a node bar. Use to drill into that stage.

actions.name: LINK_CLICKED
actions.label: Link clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks a flow ribbon. Use to drill into that flow.

actions.name: NODE_HOVERED
actions.label: Node hovered
actions.description: Fired when the user hovers a node. Useful for syncing external details panels.
